author: staaaaaaaaaan
description: Create custom commands to be executed in the command palette, and by hotkey. Currently supports opening specific notes, creating notes, inserting snippets, and executing sequences of commands.

manifest.author: Staaaaaaaaaan
manifest.description: Create custom commands to be executed in the command palette, and by hotkey. Currently supports opening specific notes, creating notes, inserting snippets, and executing sequences of commands.
manifest.name: Custom Commands

name: Custom Commands

releases.author: Staaaaaaaaaan
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* [WIP] Fix file name character error when creating notes in subfolders by @Copilot in https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/pull/9
* Revert "[WIP] Fix file name character error when creating notes in subfolders" by @Staaaaaaaaaan in https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/pull/10
* Fix invalid filename characters in create-command paths containing `{{time}}` by @Copilot in https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/pull/11

## New Contributors
* @Copilot made their first contribution in https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/pull/9

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: Staaaaaaaaaan
releases.description:
Incorporating Het suggestion to allow for referencing documents of any extension type (still defaults to .md)

## What's Changed
* Enable opening non md files by @hekatonsure in https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/pull/7

## New Contributors
* @hekatonsure made their first contribution in https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Staaaaaaaaaan/obsidian-custom-commands/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6
